title: OpenAI sued over ChatGPT’s ‘dangerous’ medical advice in first case of its kind
summary: Scott Winters says he trusted ChatGPT with his health, and it nearly cost him his life. Yet OpenAI also invites users to upload health records to ChatGPT Health.
